post.description: Creates an organization that acts as the shared storage space for files. Default quota is 10 GB.

201.description: Organization created. Returns the new organization ID.

post.summary: Create a new organization

get.description: Returns all organizations with their storage usage and quota information.
get.summary: List all organizations

post.description: Creates a folder inside an organization. Omit `parentId` to create a root-level folder.

201.description: Folder created. Returns the new folder ID.

404.description: Parent folder not found or does not belong to this organization.

post.summary: Create a folder

get.description: Returns all top-level folders (parentId = null) for the given organization, sorted by name. Use GET /files/folders/{folderId}/contents to navigate into a folder.
get.summary: List root folders of an organization

get.description: Returns the folder metadata, its direct subfolders, and a paginated list of files inside it.

parameters.name: organizationId
parameters.description: Organization UUID that owns the folder

200.description: Folder contents including subfolders and paginated files.

404.description: Folder not found or does not belong to this organization.

get.summary: Get folder contents

post.description: Uploads a file to Firebase Storage and registers it in the specified folder. Max file size: 50 MB. Allowed types: images, PDF, Word, Excel, CSV, TXT, ZIP.

parameters.name: organizationId
parameters.description: Organization UUID that owns the folder

file.description: File to upload (images, PDF, Word, Excel, CSV, TXT, ZIP — max 50 MB)

201.description: File uploaded. Returns the new file ID.

400.description: No file provided, invalid MIME type, or file exceeds 50 MB.

422.description: Storage quota exceeded for this organization.

post.summary: Upload a file to a folder

get.description: Search files across an organization by tags, name fragment, MIME type, or folder. All filters are optional and combinable. Tags are matched with OR logic (any file that has at least one of the provided tags).

parameters.name: folderId
parameters.description: Restrict search to a specific folder UUID

parameters.name: tags
parameters.description: One or more tags to match (OR logic)

get.summary: Search files

post.description: Adds one or more tags to a file. Tags are normalized to lowercase. Duplicate tags are ignored.

parameters.name: organizationId
parameters.description: Organization UUID that owns the file

400.description: Invalid input or empty tags array.

404.description: File not found or does not belong to this organization.

post.summary: Add tags to a file

delete.description: Removes one or more tags from a file. Tags not present on the file are silently ignored.

parameters.name: organizationId
parameters.description: Organization UUID that owns the file

400.description: Invalid input or empty tags array.

404.description: File not found or does not belong to this organization.

patch.description: Moves a file to a different folder within the same organization.

parameters.name: organizationId
parameters.description: Organization UUID that owns the file

404.description: File or target folder not found, or they do not belong to this organization.

patch.summary: Move a file to another folder

delete.description: Deletes the file from Firebase Storage and removes its record from the database. Also frees the storage quota used by the file in the organization.

parameters.name: organizationId
parameters.description: Organization UUID that owns the file

404.description: File not found or does not belong to this organization.

delete.description: Deletes a folder only if it has no subfolders and no files. Returns 422 if the folder is not empty.

parameters.name: organizationId
parameters.description: Organization UUID that owns the folder

404.description: Folder not found or does not belong to this organization.

422.description: Folder is not empty. Delete or move its contents first.

get.description: Generates a temporary signed URL to download the file directly from Firebase Storage. The URL expires after 1 hour.

parameters.name: organizationId
parameters.description: Organization UUID that owns the file

404.description: File not found or does not belong to this organization.

get.summary: Get signed download URL
Get dashboard summary metrics

503.description: The Health Check is not successful

id.description: Unique identifier for the menu item

label.description: Display label for the menu item

permission.description: Required permission to view this item

menus.description: Filtered menu items based on user permissions

idToken.description: Firebase ID token from the client

brandId.example: Brand UUID or null to clear

supplierId.description: Required if purchaseInvoiceId is not provided

purchaseInvoiceId.description: If provided, supplierId is derived from the invoice

bundleId.description: Bundle UUID to add slabs to

slabIds.description: List of slab UUIDs to update

failed.description: Slabs that could not be updated

supplierId.description: Required if purchaseInvoiceId is not provided

purchaseInvoiceId.description: If provided, supplierId is derived from the invoice

description.example: A premium white marble with gold veining.
A premium white marble with gold veining.

totalAreaM2.description: Total area in square meters (all statuses)

totalAvailableAreaM2.description: Total available area in square meters

delta.description: Signed quantity: positive = entry, negative = exit/adjustment

itemId.description: UUID of the tool or material

jobId.description: Job this request is associated with

approvedQuantity.description: Quantity approved by admin (may differ from requestedQuantity)

availableStock.description: Stock available when this request was processed (FIFO)

totalShortfall.description: Total shortfall across all unfulfilled requests for this material

onOrderQuantity.description: Quantity already on active purchase orders (DRAFT or SENT)

netShortfall.description: Remaining quantity still needed after subtracting onOrderQuantity

requestedQuantity.description: Original requested quantity from procurement needs — read-only reference, not editable by admin
